dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6715 : Child Predators Accountability Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Received; read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To prohibit sexual exploitation and sexually explicit depictions of minors, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Child Predators Accountability Act.

section.header: Preventing sexual exploitation and sexually explicit depictions of minors

subsection.text: Section 2251(a) of title 18, United States Code, is amended by inserting after coerces any minor to engage in, the following: or be depicted engaging in,.

subsection.header: Sexually explicit depictions of a minor for importation
subsection.text: Section 2260(a) of title 18, United States Code, is amended by inserting after coerces any minor to engage in, the following: or be depicted engaging in,.
Section 2256 of title 18, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (10), by striking and at the end;
in paragraph (11), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:
engage in, when used with respect to a minor depicted in a visual depiction of sexually explicit conduct, includes—

subparagraph.text: the participation of the minor in the sexually explicit conduct; or

the depiction of the minor in the visual depiction of the sexually explicit conduct, regardless of whether the minor participated in such conduct, if the defendant intentionally included such minor in the visual depiction.

attestation-group.attestation-date: Passed the House of Representatives January 12, 2026.
